author: seraphli
description: Convert URLs in your notes into embeded previews.

manifest.author: SErAphLi
manifest.description: This plugin auto-fetches page metadata to embed Notion-style link preview cards.
manifest.name: Link Embed

name: Link Embed

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### Bugs fixed:

- add parentheses to URL regex for Wikipedia-style URLs, fix #80([`9912832`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/99128327c6a2dd46429932ae3df979204c46387b)) (by SErAphLi)
- restore vault parameter for save images to vault feature, fix #79([`b5c9e9d`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/b5c9e9d197d7c954ec30f95a233635d65e7627f6)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### Bugs fixed:

- add button handlers to dummy embeds for failed fetch cleanup([`faab70f`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/faab70fad499799958d8b4dcff0045e3de47e80a)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### New feature:

- add markdown link favicon support (v2.10.0)([`cbf5ed0`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/cbf5ed0f64f92936044e33d09ffd623cd35d2a4d)) (by SErAphLi)

### Bugs fixed:

- resolve race condition in concurrent embed replacements([`fc379e9`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/fc379e912ae02329f00cb7f57d8f171298402e56)) (by SErAphLi)
- correct embed buttons positioning in reading mode([`1a260f6`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/1a260f6958ade2193e6c4543ae130cfe28e1e5e0)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### New feature:

- add Create Markdown Link feature and improve code architecture([`b3fb87c`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/b3fb87c8b6c78f34005fd7e10c2e8419fb3da7d6)) (by SErAphLi)  fix #73

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### New feature:

- add delete button to remove embed blocks, fix #72([`163d1d5`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/163d1d54fbfdeefcf4013d383c928cd0e7731245)) (by SErAphLi), Closes: #72

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### Bugs fixed:

- improve favicon detection with async verification and fallback handling([`332303b`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/332303b0318e79529873466da082e6a922fd32b7)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### Bugs fixed:

- update to version 2.9.1 and add Iframely API key support, fix #69([`d6f4658`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/d6f4658e3b4b8f713653586169cb9a2c3e21e8a0)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### New feature:

- add copy button functionality and improve error handling notifications([`8683622`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/8683622f8177527e7ab8b69ba73566395a7a9b8d)) (by SErAphLi)

### Bugs fixed:

- replace default favicon URL with Chrome's default globe icon data URI([`5ce46cb`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/5ce46cb3d205c3a7f767d2fa25dfe48634653eab)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### Bugs fixed:

- simplify base URL retrieval in getImage and getFavicon methods([`2bbc757`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/2bbc7574ee722db0c575e446eff771af4cb00511)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:
### New feature:

- enhance image handling by verifying image URLs and allowing logo images in headers([`3b72c79`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/3b72c79d64a61b28bf15d5e92c40079d690be52a)) (by SErAphLi)
- update version to 2.8.0, add refresh button functionality, and improve favicon handling([`9199ee5`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/9199ee5d2b235598622fbc491ada91d54a3362e3)) (by SErAphLi)
- add concurrency limiter and max concurrent local parsers setting([`0baf211`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/0baf2112aa61eb974f9dcfc134b9fb543a4e5872)) (by SErAphLi)
- add favicon support and unified caching for image dimensions, fix #57([`098e2f5`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/098e2f50d51fc304dadf69220891be330bd99614)) (by SErAphLi)

### Bugs fixed:

- implement image load attempts tracking and default dimensions fallback([`1696f28`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/1696f28071a018288afc32d43e45b265d04982a1)) (by SErAphLi)
- update URL regex to enforce proper URL format([`242c567`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/242c5677a814ada5d89d6c76decb78711c645ec1)) (by SErAphLi)
- fix render problem caused by favicon([`c58f77f`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/c58f77f051fd9c2892cb3b420d11d680a3e61347)) (by SErAphLi)
- add apikey for jsonlink([`cc6f7e8`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/cc6f7e803f53af3e3eeeac75b504bc9ab617a614)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.author: Seraphli
releases.description:

### Performance improves:

- clear cache when unload([`1300f65`](https://github.com/Seraphli/obsidian-link-embed/commit/1300f657add80a1ea0750d6fcd350b86314bec39)) (by SErAphLi)

releases.description:
